emails.body: Tana/Karen: The product long description below will fall under the new product type US= =20 Crude Basis Swap. Credit (Tom Moran) has approved copying the profiles for= =20 the new product type from the following: US WTI Fin Swap Please respond by 10 a.m. on Wednesday, November 8. Thank you. Forwarded by Lisa Lees/HOU/ECT on 11/07/2000 02:04 P= M=20 Robert B Cass 10/31/2000 05:13 PM
